# LAError.Code.systemCancel

**Case**

The system canceled authentication.

## Declaration

```swift
case systemCancel
```

## Discussion

This might happen if another app comes to the foreground while your app displays the authentication dialog.

## Cancellation

- **LAError.Code.appCancel**: The app canceled authentication.
- **LAError.Code.userCancel**: The user tapped the cancel button in the authentication dialog.

items.description: The user tapped the cancel button in the authentication dialog.
